title: Subtly Camera Shake
description: Simply a camera shake mod! Feel the immersion!
body:
# Subtly Camera Shake
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rNDTkCVfpkI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

Adds camera shake events! The camera shake intensity decreases with distance from the source. If you want more from me, be sure to download the original mod!
List of events:
- Dragon roars
- Dragon growls
- Dragon Fireball Explode
- Ravager roars
- Explosions
- Lightning Strikes
- Warden roars
- Warden sonic shrieks
- Warden emerge
- End gateway creation


This mod is a part of Subtly Dungeons.
